case_title: GOITOM GEBREZGI VS P & S TOWING

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,800.00 FILED BY GOITOM GEBREZGI AS TO DEFENDANT P & S TOWING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-21-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED SENT TO P & S TOWING.
CERT MAIL TO PAUL KHOLER MANAGER COURTESY TOW, RETURNED TO COURT SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOITOM GEBREZGI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT P & S TOWING PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS AMENDED TO SUBSTITUTE DEFENDANT P & S TOWING IN PLACE AND INSTEAD OF DEFENDANT COURTESY TOW. DEFENDANT P & S TOWING WAIVED SERVICE & NOTICE OF TRIAL, IN ORDER FOR THE MATTER TO PROCEED AS SCHEDULED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
